headline: NiSource Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Lag, EPS Growth Rate Up
summary: NI matches Q1 EPS estimates as revenues rise 9%. The company has lifted its long-term EPS growth outlook and mapped $28.6B in 2026-30 capex.

raw.headline: NiSource Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Lag, EPS Growth Rate Up
raw.summary: NI matches Q1 EPS estimates as revenues rise 9%. The company has lifted its long-term EPS growth outlook and mapped $28.6B in 2026-30 capex.

headline: Evergy to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock This Season?
summary: EVRG heads into its Q1 results with EPS seen up 17%, as data-center load and grid modernization investments stay in focus.

headline: All Eyes on Vistra's Q1 Earnings: What Lies Ahead for the Stock?
summary: VST heads into Q1 report with revenues seen up 37% and EPS up 380%, as data-center power demand and buybacks take center stage.
